How it works

Three steps to a greener day

Simple enough for anyone. Rewarding enough to keep you coming back.

Add Your Tasks

Write down what you need to do today. Set priorities, deadlines, and recurring habits.

Complete Them

Check off tasks as you go. Use Focus Mode to stay in the zone with a built-in timer.

Watch It Grow

Every task waters your garden. See new plants sprout, bloom, and fill your personal landscape.

Designed to delight

A beautiful experience on every screen

From cosy interiors to English gardens, every detail is crafted with care.

From seed to full bloom

Growth Timeline

Beyond the basics

Thoughtful features that make BloomDay
feel like more than just a to-do app

Journal

Plant Journal

Reflect on your growth journey with daily prompts. Write about your garden, track your mood, and build a beautiful record of your progress over time.

Time Capsule

Letters to Future You

Write messages to your future self, sealed until your plant blooms. A beautiful way to celebrate milestones and remember why you started.

48 Badges to Unlock

Earn badges for consistency, milestones, and special accomplishments.

Test Your Knowledge

Botanical quizzes at three difficulty levels. Learn while you grow.

Features

Everything you need to bloom

Thoughtful features that make productivity genuinely rewarding.

100+ Plant Species

Collect a diverse garden of succulents, flowers, trees, and rare botanical wonders as you complete tasks.

Focus Mode Timer

Built-in pomodoro timer helps you stay in the zone. Choose from sounds like lofi, tabla, cumbia, and cat purr.

Weekly Growth Reports

See your productivity trends, streak data, and garden growth with beautiful weekly summaries.

Time Capsule Letters

Write letters to your future self, sealed until your chosen plant reaches full bloom.

12 Garden Themes

Choose from cosy cottage, Japanese gardens, English garden, tropical paradise, and many more.

Streak Tracking

Build momentum with daily streaks. Keep your plants alive and thriving day after day.

Beautiful Animations

Watch your plants sprout, bloom, and sway in the breeze with delightful little animations.

Plant Journal

Daily prompts to reflect on your journey. Build a beautiful record of your growth over time.

Ready to grow your garden?

Join thousands of happy gardeners building better habits.
